metadata.description: Advanced multi-agent orchestration with persistent cross-session memory, per-step multi-level review, persona stitching, and adaptive flow profiles

plugins.name: hyperflow
plugins.description: Advanced multi-agent orchestration with persistent cross-session memory, per-step multi-level review, persona stitching, and adaptive flow profiles. Chain: scaffold → spec → scope → dispatch → audit → deploy. Thinking models think, worker models execute. Every step dispatches its own Worker → Reviewer pair (rule 12). 15 stitched personas, 6 flow profiles, multi-level review L1–L5.
